name: buildmaster-elite-mobile-rn-v1
description: BuildMaster Elite Mobile - React Native/Expo. Aplicativo Android real, sem PWA e sem WebView de site.

scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run prebuild:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: npm run prebuild:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
